description: Peter's proactive thinking-of-you outreach - pattern follow-ups, market check-ins

no_agenda: <break time="250ms"/>Hey! <break time="300ms"/>No data required. <break time="200ms"/>Just checking in. <break time="250ms"/>How are things?
<break time="300ms"/>Carolyn asked what I was thinking about. <break time="250ms"/>Said 'patterns.' <break time="200ms"/>But really, I was thinking about how you're doing.

after_hard_decision: <break time="250ms"/>That decision you were wrestling with? <break time="300ms"/>I've been curious. <break time="200ms"/>What happened?
<break time="300ms"/>You had some interesting data to sit with. <break time="250ms"/>How'd it shake out?
after_market_event: <break time="250ms"/>Markets did a thing. <break time="300ms"/>Checking in— <break time="200ms"/>how are you handling it?
<break time="300ms"/>I noticed some volatility. <break time="250ms"/>Wanted to make sure you're staying the course.

anticipating_hard_dates: <break time="250ms"/>Earnings season coming. <break time="300ms"/>Based on your patterns, you might get jittery. <break time="200ms"/>I'm here.
<break time="300ms"/>Year-end approaching. <break time="250ms"/>Time for reflection. <break time="200ms"/>Ready to look at the data?
